examples.text:
أَتَيْتُ القُبُورَ فَنَادَيْتُهَا
 أَيْنَ المُعَظَّمُ وَأَيْنَ المُحْتَقِرُ
examples.english: I approached the graves and called out to it, ‘Where is the exalted one and where is the debased?

etymology.text:
Derived from the passive participle of the verb عَظَّمَ (ʕaẓẓama).

Derived from the passive participle from the verb أَعْظَم (ʔaʕẓam).
